calendar.matters:
HEARING ON PETITIONER DELNITA M. CABRERA'S REQUEST FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for petition for change of name filed Mar-03-2023.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:40:18 a.m. and concluding at 10:45:23 a.m.

Petitioner Delnita M. Cabrera AKA Delnita M. Neasom AKA Delnita Mone' Cabrera AKA Delnita Mone' Neasom appearing in pro per and is placed under oath.

Petition for Change of Name filed Mar-03-2023.
Court required Petitioner to submit evidence of its date of birth.

Petitioner submits its California Drivers License to the Court.
Court verifies that Petitioner's date of birth is Sep-07-1961.

Court finds that Petitioner has met its requirements for publication.
The notice, of which the annexed is a printed copy, has been published in each regular and entire issue of the San Francisco Daily Journal on the following dates, to wit:

1. Mar-13-2023
2. Mar-20-2023
3. Mar-27-2023
4. Apr-03-2023

There is no objection to petition for change of name.
PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME IS GRANTED. PETITIONER'S NAME IS CHANGED TO NIAOM NARCEA

Decree Changing Name signed, filed, and served in open court.
